properties.displayName: Lateral Movement Detected in Azure Environment
properties.description: Detects lateral movement patterns within Azure including token theft/reuse from new IPs, use of managed identities from unexpected locations, cross-subscription activity from a single identity, and repeated VM access using just-in-time or Bastion. MITRE ATT&CK: T1550 - Use Alternate Authentication Material, T1021 - Remote Services.
properties.query:
// Detect access token reuse from multiple distinct IPs in short window
let tokenReuse = SigninLogs
    | where TimeGenerated >= ago(1h)
    | where ResultType == 0
    | where AuthenticationDetails has "accessToken" or ClientAppUsed =~ "Microsoft Azure PowerShell"
    | summarize
        DistinctIPs     = dcount(IPAddress),
        IPList          = make_set(IPAddress),
        ResourceList    = make_set(ResourceDisplayName),
        LoginCount      = count(),
        FirstSeen       = min(TimeGenerated),
        LastSeen        = max(TimeGenerated)
        by UserPrincipalName, bin(TimeGenerated, 30m)
    | where DistinctIPs >= 3
    | extend ThreatType = "TOKEN_REUSE_MULTIPLE_IPS";
// VM-to-VM lateral movement via Run Command or Custom Script Extension
let vmRunCmd = AzureActivity
    | where TimeGenerated >= ago(1h)
    | where OperationNameValue has_any ("runCommand", "CustomScriptExtension", "runShellScript")
    | where ActivityStatusValue =~ "Success"
    | summarize
        VMsAccessed = dcount(ResourceId),
        VMList      = make_set(ResourceId),
        CmdCount    = count(),
        FirstSeen   = min(TimeGenerated)
        by Caller, bin(TimeGenerated, 30m)
    | where VMsAccessed >= 2
    | extend
        ThreatType      = "VM_RUN_COMMAND_LATERAL",
        UserPrincipalName = Caller,
        DistinctIPs     = 1,
        IPList          = dynamic([]),
        ResourceList    = VMList,
        LoginCount      = CmdCount,
        LastSeen        = FirstSeen;
// Managed identity used from unexpected subscription
let managedIdentity = AuditLogs
    | where TimeGenerated >= ago(1h)
    | where InitiatedBy.app.servicePrincipalId != ""
    | where OperationName has_any ("Add member", "Update", "consent")
    | extend
        ServicePrincipal = tostring(InitiatedBy.app.displayName),
        CallerUPN        = tostring(InitiatedBy.app.servicePrincipalId)
    | summarize
        OperationCount   = count(),
        Operations       = make_set(OperationName),
        FirstSeen        = min(TimeGenerated)
        by CallerUPN, ServicePrincipal, bin(TimeGenerated, 30m)
    | where OperationCount >= 5
    | extend
        ThreatType        = "MANAGED_IDENTITY_ABUSE",
        UserPrincipalName = ServicePrincipal,
        DistinctIPs       = 0,
        IPList            = dynamic([]),
        ResourceList      = Operations,
        LoginCount        = OperationCount,
        LastSeen          = FirstSeen;
union tokenReuse, vmRunCmd, managedIdentity
| extend
    RiskScore = case(
        ThreatType == "TOKEN_REUSE_MULTIPLE_IPS",  DistinctIPs * 20 + LoginCount,
        ThreatType == "VM_RUN_COMMAND_LATERAL",    VMsAccessed * 30 + LoginCount,
        LoginCount * 10
    )
| project
    TimeGenerated = FirstSeen,
    UserPrincipalName,
    ThreatType,
    RiskScore,
    DistinctIPs,
    IPList,
    ResourceList,
    LoginCount,
    FirstSeen,
    LastSeen
| sort by RiskScore desc
